title: The Compliment/Insult Mirror (Camera Mesh)
description: A real-time ASCII camera mirror that transforms webcam video into a luminosity-mapped character grid with a tessellated mesh overlay, generating AI-style compliments or sarcastic remarks based on live mood heuristics.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: Asynchronous getUserMedia webcam capture with guarded privacy and fallback synthetic oscillator when no camera is available
Real-time luminosity grayscale density sampling via offscreen canvas at 80x60 grid resolution
Character-ramp ASCII rendering (10-level ramp) with per-cell luminance-to-character mapping
Tessellated mesh wireframe overlay with brightness-modulated opacity at coarser grid step
Mood analysis engine: average luminance, contrast variance, center-weighted face bias, and frame-delta motion detection
Bidirectional statement pool with 16 kind compliments and 16 sarcastic insults, selected by composite energy heuristic
Mode toggle (Kind/Sarcastic) with distinct cyan-teal vs hot-pink color palettes
Freeze analysis lock, scrolling diagnostics terminal, and live FPS telemetry
